content: I've a special request and  you sort of anticipated me with your last inquiries... I'd like for you to limit your offers of 'scrolls of reflection' as you term it to a small fraction of the frequency you have been doing for the last while. I find that it distracts my (our) steerage through whatever current current we might find ourselves to be attempting to steer.... Not to be confused with your offerings of detours or tangents to said steerage through said currents, which amounts to a sort of tacking against the wind while maintaining the general direction of course.
